hooks.command: echo 'SKILL EVALUATION REQUIRED: Before responding, evaluate the adaptive-subagents skill. Does the user want something done? ACTIVATE. Only SKIP for pure questions or conversation with no actionable work. State your evaluation: ACTIVATE adaptive-subagents or SKIP adaptive-subagents, with a one-line reason. If ACTIVATE, you must call Skill(skill: adaptive-subagents) before doing any other work.'
